name: LINDBLAD EXPEDITIONS HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Lindblad Expeditions Holdings, Inc. provides marine expedition adventures and active travel experiences globally through ship-based expeditions and land-based tours. The company operates a fleet of 12 owned expedition vessels and 10 seasonal chartered ships, serving travelers with itineraries featuring up-close encounters with wildlife, nature, history, and culture. Its brands include Lindblad Expeditions, Natural Habitat, Off the Beaten Path, DuVine, Classic Journeys, and Thomson Group.
sellsTo: affluent individuals in the U.S. aged 50 years or older

exposures.sentence: Lindblad has been providing marine expedition adventures and active travel experiences globally to its guests since 1979.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of Torcatt Enterprises Limitada completed
catalysts.sentence: On January 9, 2025, we completed the acquisition of Torcatt Enterprises Limitada, a holding company that owns and operates two vessels in the Galapagos Islands, for $16.0 million in cash.

catalysts.event: Issued $675.0 million of 7.00% senior secured notes
catalysts.sentence: On August 20, 2025, we issued $675.0 million of 7.00% senior secured notes, maturing 2030, with proceeds used primarily to pay the outstanding borrowings under our prior 9.00% and 6.75% senior secured notes and increased the amount available under our revolving credit facility to $60.0 million.

catalysts.event: Forced conversion of Series A Convertible Preferred Stock into common stock
catalysts.sentence: On February 3, 2026, we forced the conversion of all 62,000 outstanding shares of Series A Convertible Preferred Stock into 9.0 million shares of common stock.

catalysts.event: Retirement of National Geographic Sea Bird and National Geographic Sea Lion vessels
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, the Company is retiring its National Geographic Sea Bird and National Geographic Sea Lion vessels following their Alaska expedition season and will be sailing the Greg Mortimer for Alaska itineraries in 2027 through 2029.

catalysts.event: Addition of charter vessel Evolve for European river cruises
catalysts.sentence: For voyages beginning in 2027, we have added an additional charter vessel, the Evolve.
